name: Feature Request

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the proposed feature.

## Problem It Solves

What limitation or gap does this address? 
Please explain the use case that motivates this request.

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this working, including any API changes.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you have considered and why you ruled them out.

## Additional Context

Any other context, references, or examples from other packages.
